title: Minimalist
description: A study on geometric balance and the reduction of form to its essential functions.
teachingCopy: Minimalism is about removing the noise to reveal the intent. Every pixel must justify its existence...
realWorldCopy: The modern standard for clarity. We help you build products that breathe and speak directly to your audience.

title: Brutalist
description: Intentionally raw and unpolished, focusing on bold typography and high-contrast layouts.
teachingCopy: Brutalism is a reaction against 'polished' web design. It uses raw HTML elements and bold, oversized type...
realWorldCopy: Stand out by being different. We craft digital experiences that demand attention and refuse to blend in.

title: Bauhaus
description: An exploration of geometric simplicity where form strictly follows the requirements of function.
teachingCopy: Bauhaus teaches us that art and industry are one. Use circles, squares, and triangles to guide the eye...
realWorldCopy: Design that works. Our systems are built on the timeless principles of the Bauhaus movement.

title: Swiss Style
description: Objective clarity through mathematical grid systems and neutral sans-serif typography.
teachingCopy: Swiss design is the backbone of modern UX. By using a strict grid, we ensure content hierarchy is absolute...
realWorldCopy: Clean, precise, and global. The definitive standard for high-information density interfaces.

title: Flat Design
description: Prioritizing speed and digital utility by removing all 3D stylistic illusions.
teachingCopy: Flat design embraces the digital screen. No shadows, no gradients—just pure color and typography...
realWorldCopy: Optimized for the modern web. Lightweight, accessible, and incredibly fast user experiences.
